sections.paragraph:
Original: להד

Transliteration: lahad

Phonetic: lah'-had

BDB Definition:

Lahad = "oppression"
  1. son of Jahath, a descendant of Judah

Origin: from an unused root meaning to glow [compare H3851] or else to be earnest [compare H3854]

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
